positive: A highly stylized, central composition artwork featuring a majestic crescent moon cradling a stylized phoenix in flight. The phoenix should have flowing, symmetrical plumage rendered in deep indigo, gold, and fiery orange accents. Incorporate geometric mandalas and celestial constellations (stars, nebulae dust) seamlessly surrounding the figures, creating a cohesive, mystical tapestry. Use a bold, minimalist silhouette aesthetic with extremely clean lines and high contrast against a dark, midnight background. The overall mood should be ethereal, powerful, and symmetrical, optimized for wearable art.
negative: blurry, artifact, bad anatomy, deformed, disfigured, mutation, noise, text, watermark, logo, extra limbs, cropped, poorly rendered, low resolution, amateur, grainy
